daily_summary.headline: Routine Day in Space: Starlink Launches and Aurora Insights

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 17-18 Launch
top_events.description: A batch of 25 satellites for the Starlink mega-constellation, enhancing global internet coverage.

top_events.title: Firefly Alpha | Stairway to Seven
top_events.description: Test flight for Firefly Alpha's return-to-flight mission, validating key systems.

top_events.title: Aurora Forecast
top_events.description: Low geomagnetic activity with no significant aurora viewing opportunities.
